title: Israeli Shield
description: Replaces the default Minecraft shield with a design inspired by the Israeli flag.
body:
This resource pack customizes the Minecraft shield texture, featuring the iconic blue and white colors along with the Magen David (Star of David) symbol. It's a great way to personalize your gameplay and show your connection to Israeli culture within the game.

**Thank you for using this pack!** _Created by Itay912._
